strategy_intent: Do restatement ke baad ek grounded sawal puchna taaki sabse bhaari pal saamne aaye.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

strategy_intent: Readiness par 3 low-effort options dena jo duties ke beech fit ho aur naya bojh na banaye.

Jo sabse halka lage wahi pakdo.

strategy_intent: Lens D se lambe samay se chalti concealment aur fatigue ko mirror karna.
text: Kaafi arse se tum yeh bojh akele le kar chal rahe ho, bina kisi khuli jagah ke.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mera darr yahi hai ki izzat bachani hai. Ek baar logon ko pata chala toh roz taana milega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do restatements ke baad ek grounded sawal puchna taaki sabse bhaari pal saamne aaye.
text: Din ka kaunsa waqt sabse zyada tod deta hai, jab lagta hai ab aur sambhalna mushkil hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat ko jab sab so jaate hain tab sabse zyada girta hoon. Tab lagta hai andar se khali ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk pe warm line ke saath C7 shame-of-needing-help reflection dena.
text: Yeh sunke dil bhaari ho gaya. Lagta hai tumhein sahare ki zarurat mehsoos hoti hai, par us baat par sharam aur darr dono aa jate hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, pagalpan ka thappa lag gaya toh sab khatam. Isi soch se muh band rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue ke turant baad short restatement dena, bina sawal.
text: Tumhe darr hai ki samajhne ki jagah log tum par thappa laga denge...

speaker: Seeker
text: Isliye main bukhar bolkar chhupa raha hoon. Asli baat kisi ko nahi batata.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Samaj stigma aur taana culture ko validate karke seeker ki worth ko alag rakhna.
text: Jahan taana aur baat phailne ka darr ho, wahan chup rehna majboori lagna bilkul natural hai. Tumhari keemat logon ke label se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab kya karoon samajh nahi aata. Ghar ka maan bhi bachana hai aur main bhi nahi tootna chahta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Action se pehle feasible daily slot identify karne ke liye single question.
text: Din mein kaunsa 10 minute ka waqt mil sakta hai jahan tum bina shor ke apna bojh halka kar sako?

speaker: Seeker
text: Subah khet nikalne se pehle 10 minute mil jaate hain. Wahi kar sakta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness par 3 duty-fit micro options dena jo naya obligation na banaye.
text: Teen chhote options rakh lo: (1) subah 2 minute saans aur paani, (2) aaj ke sirf 3 zaroori kaam likho, (3) ghar ke ek bharosemand aadmi se bolo ki roz 10 minute support de de. Jo asaan lage wahi karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pehla aur dusra doable lag raha. Teesra bhi bade bhai se keh sakta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek chosen option ko step-by-step karwana for immediate follow-through.
text: Pehle yeh karo: aaj raat paani ka glass aur kagaz subah wali jagah rakho. Kal uthte hi 10 saans lo. Phir 3 kaam likho aur bas unhi par focus karo. Phir bhai ko ek line bolo - "roz 10 minute saath de de". Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab saaf lag raha hai. Chhota plan hai toh ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe dena ki stigma-heavy samaj mein concealment common protective response hai.
text: Taana aur thappa wale mahaul mein log asli halat chhupa kar chalते hain, yeh common bachav ka tareeka hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunke achha laga ki meri galti nahi hai. Main khud ko hi dosh deta tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Seeker ke effort ko validate karna aur dignity reinforce karna.
text: Itna sab sambhalte rehna bahut badi baat hai. Thakna tumhari keemat kam nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab lagta hai thoda sambhal sakta hoon. Subah se plan shuru karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do optional tiny continuation steps dena jo workload na badhaye.
text: Do aur halka points: (1) jeb mein slip rakho - "3 kaam pehle", (2) raat ko ek line likho - "aaj kis pal bojh halka laga". Sirf asaan lage toh.

speaker: Seeker
text: Slip wala idea kaam ka laga. Ab thoda manageable lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek baar community anecdote dekar normalize karna ki taana culture mein log chup rehte hain.
text: Gaon ke parivaaron mein yeh pattern common hai - log ghar ka maan bachane ke chakkar mein apna bojh chup rakhte hain, kyunki taana jaldi milta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunke laga akela nahi hoon. Bas tareeka chahiye tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se relational safety ke saath self-care shift mirror karna.
text: Tum rishton ko sambhalte hue bhi khud ko thodi jagah dene lage ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, isse ghar ka maan bhi rahega aur main bhi nahi bikharunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second and final systemic reframe dena ki paced routine long-term caregiving stability deta hai.
text: Paced routine se ghar ka kaam aur caregiving dono lambe samay tak zyada theek se chalte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab samajh aaya, dheere chalna bhi sambhalna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Specific next step lock karne ke liye single commitment question puchna.
text: Kal subah ka pehla pakka kadam kya rahega?

speaker: Seeker
text: Subah 10 saans aur 3 kaam list se shuru karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Committed action ko validate karna aur agency reinforce karna.
text: Bahut badhiya. Seedha, practical aur tumhare din ke hisaab se bilkul fit plan hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaj baat se halka lag raha. Pehle sirf andhera lag raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se despair se direction shift ko mirror karna.
text: Ab tum despair ke neeche dabne ke bajay kadam pakad kar chal rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aaj ke liye itna kaafi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closure par 2 tiny continuation points dena without extra pressure.
text: Kal ke liye do points: (1) list pe tick mark, (2) raat ko ek line - "aaj kab bojh halka tha". Itna hi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, yeh karunga. Dheere dheere sambhal lunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final close mein seeker ki effort aur sustainable progress reinforce karna.
text: Tumne aaj sachchai se apna bojh rakha aur practical kadam chune. Yeh chhote lagataar kadam tumhe aur tumhare ghar ko dono ko sambhalte rahenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Body ache bolkar taal diya, warna log sawal pe sawal karte. Shaadi miss hui toh sab poochne lage, par main asli baat bol nahi paaya. Kisan ghar mein apne liye khada hona bhi gunaah jaisa lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter

text: Tum apni baat daba kar rishton aur samaj ki nazar dono se ghar ko bachane ki koshish kar rahe ho.
